OgaPay

Terms of Service

Effective January 1, 2025 · Last Updated May 2026

1. Introduction

Welcome to OgaPay. These Terms of Service govern your access to and use of the OgaPay platform, website, and services. By creating an account or using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

2. Eligibility

By using OgaPay, you represent that you are at least 18 years of age, a resident of Nigeria or another jurisdiction where our services are available, and have not been previously suspended from our platform.

3. Account Registration

To access certain features, you must create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account.

4. Membership Plans

OgaPay offers three membership tiers:

Free

Free Forever
₦0
Best for: Customers
  • Deals & EarnBack
  • Community Access
  • Weekly Deals Newsletter
  • Net-7 Weekly Payouts
Most Popular

Member

Most Popular
₦3,000 /year
Best for: Individuals
  • Everything in Free
  • Easy Tasks
  • Crypto Bounties
  • Member Support
  • EarnBack Rewards
  • Net-7 Payouts (3% fee)

Member+

For Business
₦10,000 /year
Best for: Businesses
  • Everything in Member
  • List Crypto Bounties
  • Priority Support
  • Private Community
  • Verified Task Listings

5. Tasks and Submissions

Tasks are posted by businesses and completed by members. By submitting work, you agree to complete tasks accurately, submit original work, and comply with advertiser instructions. OgaPay uses an AI-powered review system to verify submissions.

6. Payouts and Payments

OgaPay processes member payouts every Thursday (Net-7). Payouts are made in NGN or USDC. Minimum payout thresholds and processing fees may apply depending on membership tier.

7. Prohibited Activities

  • Creating multiple accounts to abuse rewards
  • Using bots or automated methods to complete tasks
  • Posting fraudulent or misleading content
  • Attempting to manipulate platform operations
  • Engaging in money laundering or illegal activity

8. Advertiser Terms

Businesses posting tasks must provide clear, lawful briefs, pay associated fees, and comply with applicable laws.

9. Intellectual Property

The OgaPay platform, including its design, logo, and technology, is owned by OgaPay. Task submissions remain the property of the advertiser who commissioned them.

10. Privacy

Your privacy is important to us. Our Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

11. Disclaimers

OgaPay provides its platform on an "as is" basis. We make no warranties regarding availability, accuracy of tasks, or approval of submissions.

12. Termination

Either party may terminate this agreement. OgaPay may suspend accounts for violation of these Terms. Remaining balances will be paid out within 30 days of termination.

13. Dispute Resolution

Disputes shall be resolved through informal resolution, mediation, or binding arbitration in Lagos, Nigeria.

14. General Provisions

These Terms constitute the entire agreement between you and OgaPay. If any part is found invalid, the rest remains in effect.

15. Contact Information

For questions regarding these Terms, contact support@ogapay.net or legal@ogapay.net.
